data.title: As a plugin operator, agent and skill documentation references plugin files portably
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Replace all plugins/dso/... path strings in .md files within plugins/dso/agents/, plugins/dso/skills/, and plugins/dso/docs/ with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/... where the reference is used by an agent at runtime (Read tool paths, Bash commands, script invocations in prompts). Leave references that describe repo-relative locations for human readers or git/grep commands as plain relative paths (e.g., `agents/foo.md`) without the plugins/dso/ prefix.
**Why**: Agent and skill markdown files contain inline instructions that agents execute. When those instructions reference plugin files by install path, they fail in host projects where the plugin lives elsewhere.
**Scope**:
- IN: All plugins/dso/... references in .md files under plugins/dso/ where the reference is used by an agent at runtime
- OUT: .sh script files (S1, S2); references in markdown that describe repo-relative paths for human readers or git commands (use plain relative form)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, `grep -r "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/` returns zero matches on runtime-path lines (lines containing Read tool paths, script invocations, or Bash commands referencing plugin files)
  ← Satisfies: "All agent and skill markdown files use the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ prefix"
- When this story is complete, human-readable documentation prose that describes repo structure uses plugin-root-relative paths (e.g., `agents/foo.md`) rather than absolute install paths and is not converted to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}
  ← Satisfies: "All agent and skill markdown files use the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ prefix"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Scope boundary] Distinguish three reference types: (a) runtime shell paths agents expand at dispatch time — convert to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/...; (b) human-readable prose describing repo layout — use plugin-root-relative form (agents/foo.md); (c) grep/git commands in documentation referencing repo-relative paths — may stay as-is since ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is meaningless outside a shim-invoked shell context.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
